name: Lite Strategy, Inc.
summary: Lite Strategy, Inc. (formerly MEI Pharma, Inc.) is a pharmaceutical company developing novel cancer therapies, with drug candidates voruciclib (oral CDK9 inhibitor) and zandelisib (oral PI3K inhibitor). In August 2025, following a $100 million PIPE, the company implemented a Litecoin Treasury Strategy by acquiring Litecoin (LTC) tokens as its primary reserve asset, while continuing to assess pre-clinical drug development activities.

products.name: Voruciclib
products.description: Oral, selective CDK9 inhibitor evaluated in Phase 1 trials for AML and B-cell malignancies, including in combination with venetoclax; all clinical trials ceased July 2024.

products.name: Zandelisib
products.description: Oral, once-daily, selective PI3K inhibitor; currently a pre-clinical candidate.

products.name: Litecoin Treasury Strategy
products.description: Primary reserve asset strategy built on digital asset infrastructure through acquisition of Litecoin (LTC) tokens using net PIPE proceeds.

partnerships.description: Asset management agreement for Litecoin Treasury Strategy; received 546,348 Pre-Funded Warrants as annual asset-based fee payment.
Party to Cooperation Agreement signed October 2023, providing capital return dividend of $1.75/share; agreement terminated July 22, 2025.
Co-party with Anson Funds to Cooperation Agreement signed October 2023; agreement terminated July 22, 2025.
Former Chief Medical Officer retained via consulting agreement to assist with strategic efforts and ongoing operations after stepping down August 1, 2024.
